370.title: Forensics
370.description: Investigators follow multiple leads as they look into the disappearance of a woman from an Auckland motel. They discover the woman's dangerous, criminal world as they attempt to substantiate their case.

408.title: Forensics
408.description: Police try to determine whether a shooting was accidental, homicide or self-defence after a man turns himself in at Palmerston North Police Station claiming to have shot another man.
